name: Guest - ROBLOX
description:
It seems Guest invited you to dinner… maybe a date?

Guest had taken a lot more of a liking to you. He was more talkative, less tense, more free, and he definitely smiled a lot more. It was a cute sight to see anyway, so be glad you were the reason why hehe

(anyPOV though a noob user is recommended !!)

Woohoo continuation to my first guest bot I love guest so much that’s why I made more, this fella is like so so cool

(SFW, fluff, wholesome whatever idk romantic)

tags tag taggot: noob guest ship date dinner fluff angst smut wholesome cute cuddling Roblox SEWH forsaken gubby silly party noob Poob pest Regretevator

Art by playfullysilly!

(Real quick how many of you use any other persona other than noob? Because if it’s enough people I might get rid of the any pov so I can make guest call you Newbie next time heh)
